content.json:
# DMARC Report Analytics

This workbook provides comprehensive DMARC analytics with visualizations across 5 tabs. Monitor email authentication health, detect spoofing, track compliance scores, analyze senders, and plan policy enforcement across your domains. Filter by domain, reporter, and time range.

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.query: DMARCReports_CL | distinct Domain | sort by Domain asc

parameters.name: Reporter
parameters.query: DMARCReports_CL | distinct ReportOrgName | sort by ReportOrgName asc

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
let stats = data
| summarize
    TotalMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    DomainsMonitored = dcount(Domain),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueReporters = dcount(ReportOrgName);
let policyStats = data
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p) by Domain
| summarize
    EnforcedDomains = countif(PolicyPublished_p in ('quarantine', 'reject')),
    TotalDomains = count();
let combined = stats | extend x = 1
| join kind=inner (policyStats | extend x = 1) on x
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / TotalMessages, 1),
    EnforcementPct = round(100.0 * EnforcedDomains / TotalDomains, 1);
union
    (combined | project Metric="Total Messages", Value=tostring(TotalMessages)),
    (combined | project Metric="Pass Rate %", Value=tostring(PassRate)),
    (combined | project Metric="Domains Monitored", Value=tostring(DomainsMonitored)),
    (combined | project Metric="Enforcement %", Value=tostring(EnforcementPct)),
    (combined | project Metric="Unique IPs", Value=tostring(UniqueIPs)),
    (combined | project Metric="Unique Reporters", Value=tostring(UniqueReporters))
content.title: Key Metrics

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let thisWeek = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    TW_Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    TW_Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    TW_Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    TW_UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP);
let lastWeek = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(14d) .. ago(7d))
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    LW_Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    LW_Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    LW_Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    LW_UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP);
thisWeek | extend x = 1
| join kind=inner (lastWeek | extend x = 1) on x
| project-away x, x1
| extend
    TW_PassRate = round(100.0 * TW_Pass / TW_Messages, 1),
    LW_PassRate = round(100.0 * LW_Pass / LW_Messages, 1),
    MsgChange = iff(LW_Messages > 0, round(100.0 * (TW_Messages - LW_Messages) / LW_Messages, 1), 0.0),
    FailChange = TW_Fail - LW_Fail,
    IPChange = TW_UniqueIPs - LW_UniqueIPs
| extend PassRateChange = round(TW_PassRate - LW_PassRate, 1)
| project
    PassRate = strcat(TW_PassRate, '% (', iff(PassRateChange >= 0, '+', ''), PassRateChange, '%)'),
    Volume = strcat(TW_Messages, ' (', iff(MsgChange >= 0, '+', ''), MsgChange, '%)'),
    Failures = strcat(TW_Fail, ' (', iff(FailChange >= 0, '+', ''), FailChange, ')'),
    UniqueIPs = strcat(TW_UniqueIPs, ' (', iff(IPChange >= 0, '+', ''), IPChange, ')')
content.title: Week-over-Week Comparison

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
data
| summarize
    DmarcPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    SpfPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    DkimPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass'),
    Total = sum(MessageCount)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend
    DmarcPassRate = round(100.0 * DmarcPass / Total, 1),
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * SpfPass / Total, 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * DkimPass / Total, 1)
| project TimeGenerated, DmarcPassRate, SpfPassRate, DkimPassRate
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Compliance Rate Trend (Daily)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail')
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Pass/Fail Trend (Daily)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
let policies = data
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p) by Domain
| project Domain, PolicyPublished_p;
data
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    DmarcPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    SpfPassCount = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    DkimPassCount = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass')
    by Domain
| join kind=leftouter policies on Domain
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * DmarcPass / Messages, 1),
    ComplianceScore = round(
        0.40 * (100.0 * DmarcPass / Messages)
        + 0.25 * (100.0 * SpfPassCount / Messages)
        + 0.25 * (100.0 * DkimPassCount / Messages)
        + 0.10 * case(PolicyPublished_p == 'reject', 100.0, PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine', 60.0, PolicyPublished_p == 'none', 20.0, 0.0)
    , 0)
| extend
    RiskLevel = case(
        ComplianceScore >= 90, 'Low',
        ComplianceScore >= 70, 'Moderate',
        ComplianceScore >= 50, 'High',
        'Critical'
    )
| project Domain, ComplianceScore, RiskLevel, PassRate, Policy=PolicyPublished_p, Messages
| sort by ComplianceScore asc
content.title: Per-Domain Risk Level

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
let domainIssues = data
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    FailedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p)
    by Domain
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * (Messages - FailedMessages) / Messages, 1)
| extend Issue = case(
    PolicyPublished_p == 'none' and PassRate >= 97, strcat('Domain "', Domain, '" is ready for p=quarantine (', PassRate, '% pass rate) - move from monitor mode'),
    PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine' and PassRate >= 99, strcat('Domain "', Domain, '" is ready for p=reject (', PassRate, '% pass rate) - strengthen enforcement'),
    PassRate < 80, strcat('Domain "', Domain, '" has critical auth failures (', PassRate, '% pass rate, ', FailedMessages, ' failures) - investigate sources'),
    PassRate < 95, strcat('Domain "', Domain, '" has auth issues (', PassRate, '% pass rate) - review failing senders'),
    ''
)
| where isnotempty(Issue);
let ipIssues = data
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize FailedMessages = sum(MessageCount), Domains = make_set(Domain, 3) by SourceIP
| where FailedMessages >= 10
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org)
| extend Issue = strcat('Suspicious IP ', SourceIP, ' (', ASN_Org, ') sent ', FailedMessages, ' failed messages for ', strcat_array(Domains, ', '))
| top 5 by FailedMessages desc;
let policyIssues = data
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p) by Domain
| where PolicyPublished_p == 'none'
| summarize Domains = make_list(Domain)
| where array_length(Domains) > 0
| extend Issue = strcat(array_length(Domains), ' domain(s) still in monitor mode (p=none): ', strcat_array(Domains, ', '));
union
    (domainIssues | project Priority = case(Issue has 'critical', 1, Issue has 'ready for p=reject', 2, Issue has 'ready for p=quarantine', 3, 4), Category = 'Domain Health', Issue),
    (ipIssues | project Priority = 1, Category = 'Suspicious Activity', Issue),
    (policyIssues | project Priority = 3, Category = 'Policy Progression', Issue)
| sort by Priority asc
| take 15
| project Priority = case(Priority == 1, 'Critical', Priority == 2, 'High', Priority == 3, 'Medium', 'Low'), Category, ActionItem = Issue
content.title: What to Fix Next

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
let total = toscalar(data | summarize sum(MessageCount));
data
| extend
    SPF_Status = iff(PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass', 'SPF Pass', 'SPF Fail'),
    DKIM_Status = iff(PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass', 'DKIM Pass', 'DKIM Fail')
| summarize Messages = sum(MessageCount) by SPF_Status, DKIM_Status
| extend
    DMARC_Result = iff(SPF_Status == 'SPF Pass' or DKIM_Status == 'DKIM Pass', 'DMARC Pass', 'DMARC Fail'),
    Percentage = round(100.0 * Messages / total, 1)
| project SPF_Status, DKIM_Status, DMARC_Result, Messages, Percentage
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: DMARC/SPF/DKIM Combined Authentication Matrix
SPF Results
DKIM Results

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SPF & DKIM Pass Rate Trend

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type)
| mv-expand ReasonType = split(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type, '; ')
| extend ReasonType = tostring(ReasonType)
| summarize Messages = sum(MessageCount) by ReasonType
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Failure Reason Types

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    Domains = make_set(Domain, 10),
    SampleComments = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_reason_comment, 5)
    by PolicyEvaluated_reason_type
| sort by Messages desc
| project ReasonType = PolicyEvaluated_reason_type, Messages, UniqueIPs, Domains, SampleComments
content.title: Failure Reason Details

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type)
| summarize
    OverriddenMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    SampleIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 5),
    Domains = make_set(Domain, 5),
    SampleComments = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_reason_comment, 3)
    by PolicyEvaluated_reason_type, PublishedPolicy = PolicyPublished_p, ActualDisposition = PolicyEvaluated_disposition
| sort by OverriddenMessages desc
content.title: Policy Override Reasons

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org)
| summarize
    FailedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    SpfFails = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    DkimFails = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail'),
    SpfDomains = make_set(SpfDomain, 3),
    DkimDomains = make_set(DkimDomain, 3),
    DkimSelectors = make_set(DkimSelector, 3),
    HeaderFroms = make_set(HeaderFrom, 3),
    ReasonTypes = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type, 3)
    by SourceIP, ASN_Org
| extend
    Remediation = case(
        SpfFails > 0 and DkimFails == 0, strcat('Add ', SourceIP, ' to SPF record for ', strcat_array(SpfDomains, '/')),
        DkimFails > 0 and SpfFails == 0, strcat('Check DKIM signing config for selector(s): ', strcat_array(DkimSelectors, ', ')),
        SpfFails > 0 and DkimFails > 0 and tostring(ReasonTypes) has 'forwarded', 'Forwarded mail - consider ARC or trusted forwarder list',
        SpfFails > 0 and DkimFails > 0, strcat('Fix both SPF (add IP) and DKIM (configure signing) for ', strcat_array(HeaderFroms, '/')),
        'Investigate sender configuration'
    )
| top 25 by FailedMessages desc
| project SourceIP, ASN_Org, FailedMessages, SpfFails, DkimFails, Remediation, HeaderFroms
content.title: Top Failing Senders with Fix Recommendations

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where
    (PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass')
    or PolicyEvaluated_reason_type has_any ('forwarded', 'trusted_forwarder', 'mailing_list')
    or (isnotempty(EnvelopeFrom) and HeaderFrom != EnvelopeFrom and PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass')
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org)
| summarize
    ForwardedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    UniqueForwarderIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    ForwarderOrgs = make_set(ASN_Org, 10),
    TargetDomains = make_set(Domain, 5),
    ReasonTypes = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_reason_type, 5)
    by HeaderFrom
| sort by ForwardedMessages desc
| take 50
content.title: Forwarding Detection

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(EnvelopeFrom) and isnotempty(HeaderFrom)
| extend
    Aligned = iff(tolower(HeaderFrom) == tolower(EnvelopeFrom), true, false),
    SpfPassed = PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass',
    DkimPassed = PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass'
| extend
    Pattern = case(
        Aligned and SpfPassed and DkimPassed, 'Aligned - Full Pass',
        Aligned and (SpfPassed or DkimPassed), 'Aligned - Partial Pass',
        Aligned and not(SpfPassed) and not(DkimPassed), 'Aligned - Full Fail',
        not(Aligned) and DkimPassed and not(SpfPassed), 'Mismatched - Likely Forwarded (DKIM pass, SPF fail)',
        not(Aligned) and not(SpfPassed) and not(DkimPassed), 'Mismatched - Likely Spoofed (Both fail)',
        not(Aligned) and SpfPassed and DkimPassed, 'Mismatched - Both Pass (Indirect send)',
        'Other'
    )
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    SampleHeaderFroms = make_set(HeaderFrom, 5),
    SampleEnvelopeFroms = make_set(EnvelopeFrom, 5)
    by Pattern
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Envelope vs Header From Analysis

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, SpfResult == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, DkimResult == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1)
    by SpfDomain
| top 25 by Messages desc
| project SpfDomain, Messages, SpfPassRate, DkimPassRate
content.title: Authentication by SPF Domain

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(DkimSelector)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    PassCount = sumif(MessageCount, DkimResult == 'pass'),
    FailCount = sumif(MessageCount, DkimResult != 'pass'),
    Domains = make_set(Domain)
    by DkimSelector, DkimDomain
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * PassCount / Messages, 1)
| top 50 by Messages desc
| project DkimSelector, DkimDomain, Messages, PassRate, PassCount, FailCount, Domains
content.title: DKIM Results by Selector

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| extend
    DKIM_Alignment = iff(isempty(PolicyPublished_adkim), 'r', PolicyPublished_adkim),
    SPF_Alignment = iff(isempty(PolicyPublished_aspf), 'r', PolicyPublished_aspf)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    PassedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass')
    by DKIM_AlignmentMode = DKIM_Alignment, SPF_AlignmentMode = SPF_Alignment
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * PassedMessages / Messages, 1),
    DKIM_Mode = iff(DKIM_AlignmentMode == 's', 'Strict', 'Relaxed'),
    SPF_Mode = iff(SPF_AlignmentMode == 's', 'Strict', 'Relaxed')
| project DKIM_Mode, SPF_Mode, Messages, PassedMessages, PassRate
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Alignment Mode Breakdown

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let knownESPs = dynamic(['google', 'microsoft', 'amazon', 'sendgrid', 'mailchimp', 'mailgun', 'postmark', 'sparkpost', 'sendinblue', 'brevo', 'constantcontact', 'salesforce', 'hubspot', 'zendesk', 'freshdesk', 'intercom', 'mandrill', 'mimecast', 'proofpoint', 'barracuda', 'cisco', 'cloudflare', 'fastmail', 'zoho', 'rackspace', 'godaddy', 'ovh', 'hetzner', 'ionos']);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    Domains = make_set(Domain, 5),
    HeaderFroms = make_set(HeaderFrom, 5)
    by SourceIP
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend
    ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org),
    Country = tostring(GeoInfo.country)
| extend
    ASN_Org_Lower = tolower(ASN_Org),
    PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1)
| extend
    Classification = case(
        PassRate >= 95 and ASN_Org_Lower has_any (knownESPs), 'Authorized (Known ESP)',
        PassRate >= 95, 'Authorized (Passing)',
        PassRate >= 50 and ASN_Org_Lower has_any (knownESPs), 'Needs Attention (Known ESP)',
        PassRate < 50 and ASN_Org_Lower has_any (knownESPs), 'Misconfigured (Known ESP)',
        PassRate < 50, 'Unknown / Suspicious',
        'Unclassified'
    )
| top 100 by Messages desc
| project SourceIP, Classification, ASN_Org, Country, Messages, PassRate, Domains, HeaderFroms
| sort by Classification asc, Messages desc
content.title: Top Senders - Authorized vs Unknown

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize Messages = sum(MessageCount) by SourceIP
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend ASN_Org = tolower(tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org))
| extend Category = case(
    ASN_Org has_any ('amazon', 'aws'), 'Cloud: AWS',
    ASN_Org has_any ('microsoft', 'azure'), 'Cloud: Azure',
    ASN_Org has_any ('google', 'gcp'), 'Cloud: Google',
    ASN_Org has_any ('digitalocean'), 'Cloud: DigitalOcean',
    ASN_Org has_any ('sendgrid'), 'ESP: SendGrid',
    ASN_Org has_any ('mailchimp', 'intuit'), 'ESP: Mailchimp',
    ASN_Org has_any ('mailgun'), 'ESP: Mailgun',
    ASN_Org has_any ('salesforce', 'exacttarget'), 'ESP: Salesforce',
    ASN_Org has_any ('hubspot'), 'ESP: HubSpot',
    ASN_Org has_any ('mimecast'), 'Security: Mimecast',
    ASN_Org has_any ('proofpoint'), 'Security: Proofpoint',
    ASN_Org has_any ('barracuda'), 'Security: Barracuda',
    ASN_Org has_any ('cloudflare'), 'Infra: Cloudflare',
    ASN_Org has_any ('ovh'), 'Hosting: OVH',
    ASN_Org has_any ('hetzner'), 'Hosting: Hetzner',
    ASN_Org has_any ('godaddy'), 'Hosting: GoDaddy',
    'Other'
)
| summarize Messages = sum(Messages), UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP) by Category
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Source IP Classification by Provider

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    Reporters = dcount(ReportOrgName)
    by HeaderFrom
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1)
| top 50 by Messages desc
| project HeaderFrom, Messages, PassRate, Fail, UniqueIPs, Reporters
content.title: Top 50 Sending Identities (HeaderFrom)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let lookback = 30d;
let recentWindow = 1d;
let baseline = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(recentWindow))
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize DailyMessages = sum(MessageCount) by SourceIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize
    AvgDailyVolume = avg(DailyMessages),
    StdDevVolume = stdev(DailyMessages),
    DaysActive = dcount(TimeGenerated)
    by SourceIP
| where DaysActive >= 3;
let recent = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(recentWindow)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize RecentMessages = sum(MessageCount) by SourceIP;
baseline
| join kind=inner recent on SourceIP
| extend
    ZScore = iff(StdDevVolume > 0, round((RecentMessages - AvgDailyVolume) / StdDevVolume, 2), 0.0),
    VolumeMultiple = round(RecentMessages / AvgDailyVolume, 1)
| where ZScore > 2.0 or VolumeMultiple > 3.0
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org), Country = tostring(GeoInfo.country)
| project SourceIP, ASN_Org, Country, RecentMessages, AvgDailyVolume = round(AvgDailyVolume, 0), VolumeMultiple, ZScore, DaysActive
| sort by ZScore desc
| take 25
content.title: Volume Anomaly Detection (Last 24h vs 30d Baseline)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    Domains = make_set(Domain, 5)
    by SourceIP
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1),
    ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org),
    Country = tostring(GeoInfo.country)
| top 50 by Messages desc
| project SourceIP, Messages, PassRate, ASN_Org, Country,
    ReputationLookup = strcat('https://talosintelligence.com/reputation_center/lookup?search=', SourceIP),
    Domains
content.title: Top 50 Source IPs (with Reputation Lookup)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize
    FailedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    Domains = make_set(Domain),
    HeaderFroms = make_set(HeaderFrom)
    by SourceIP
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend
    ASN = tostring(GeoInfo.asn),
    ASN_Org = tostring(GeoInfo.asn_org),
    Country = tostring(GeoInfo.country)
| top 25 by FailedMessages desc
| project SourceIP, FailedMessages, ASN, ASN_Org, Country, HeaderFroms, Domains
content.title: Suspicious IPs (Both SPF & DKIM Failing)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    TotalMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    PassedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    FailedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
    by SourceIP
| extend GeoInfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(SourceIP)
| extend
    Latitude = toreal(GeoInfo.latitude),
    Longitude = toreal(GeoInfo.longitude),
    Country = tostring(GeoInfo.country),
    City = tostring(GeoInfo.city),
    PassRate = round(100.0 * PassedMessages / TotalMessages, 1)
| where isnotnull(Latitude) and isnotnull(Longitude)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(TotalMessages),
    PassRate = round(avg(PassRate), 1),
    IPs = sum(UniqueIPs)
    by Country, City, Latitude, Longitude
| project Country, City, Latitude, Longitude, Messages, PassRate, IPs
content.title: Geographic Distribution of Email Sources

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let known = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d))
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| distinct SourceIP;
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where SourceIP !in (known)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Domains = make_set(Domain),
    DkimResult = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_dkim),
    SpfResult = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_spf)
    by SourceIP
| sort by Messages desc
| take 50
content.title: New Source IPs (Last 24h vs Previous 30 Days)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
let policies = data
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p, PolicyPublished_sp) by Domain
| project Domain, PolicyPublished_p, PolicyPublished_sp;
data
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    DmarcPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    DmarcFail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    SpfPassCount = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    DkimPassCount = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    SuspiciousIPs = dcountif(SourceIP, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail')
    by Domain
| join kind=leftouter policies on Domain
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * DmarcPass / Messages, 1),
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * SpfPassCount / Messages, 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * DkimPassCount / Messages, 1),
    ComplianceScore = round(
        0.40 * (100.0 * DmarcPass / Messages)
        + 0.25 * (100.0 * SpfPassCount / Messages)
        + 0.25 * (100.0 * DkimPassCount / Messages)
        + 0.10 * case(PolicyPublished_p == 'reject', 100.0, PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine', 60.0, PolicyPublished_p == 'none', 20.0, 0.0)
    , 0)
| extend
    RiskLevel = case(
        ComplianceScore >= 90, 'Low',
        ComplianceScore >= 70, 'Moderate',
        ComplianceScore >= 50, 'High',
        'Critical'
    )
| project Domain, ComplianceScore, RiskLevel, PassRate, SpfPassRate, DkimPassRate,
    Policy=PolicyPublished_p, SubdomainPolicy=PolicyPublished_sp,
    Messages, UniqueIPs, SuspiciousIPs
| sort by ComplianceScore asc
content.title: Per-Domain Compliance Score & Risk Level

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    SuspiciousIPs = dcountif(SourceIP, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    ForwardingOverrides = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_reason_type has_any ('forwarded', 'mailing_list', 'trusted_forwarder')),
    DaysWithData = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p, PolicyPublished_sp)
    by Domain
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1),
    AdjustedPassRate = round(100.0 * (Pass + ForwardingOverrides) / Messages, 1)
| extend
    CurrentPolicy = PolicyPublished_p,
    RecommendedAction = case(
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject' and PassRate >= 99, 'Maintain - Fully Enforced',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject' and PassRate < 99, 'Review - Reject active but pass rate below 99%',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine' and AdjustedPassRate >= 99 and DaysWithData >= 30, 'Ready for p=reject',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine' and AdjustedPassRate >= 95, 'Almost Ready - Improve to 99%+ before reject',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine', 'Not Ready - Fix auth failures first',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'none' and AdjustedPassRate >= 97 and DaysWithData >= 14, 'Ready for p=quarantine',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'none' and AdjustedPassRate >= 90, 'Almost Ready - Improve to 97%+ before quarantine',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'none', 'Not Ready - Fix auth failures first',
        'Check configuration'
    )
| project Domain, CurrentPolicy, PassRate, AdjustedPassRate, RecommendedAction,
    Messages, Fail, ForwardingOverrides, DaysWithData, SuspiciousIPs
| sort by Domain asc
content.title: Domain Readiness for Policy Enforcement (Last 30 Days)
Disposition Over Time
Policy Disposition
Published DMARC Policies

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
let data = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
;
data
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    DmarcPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    DkimPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass'),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, PolicyPublished_p, PolicyPublished_adkim)
    by Domain
| extend
    PassRate = round(100.0 * DmarcPass / Messages, 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * DkimPass / Messages, 1)
| extend
    BIMIReadiness = case(
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject' and DkimPassRate >= 99 and PassRate >= 99, 'Ready',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject' and DkimPassRate >= 95, 'Almost Ready - Improve DKIM to 99%+',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'quarantine', 'Not Ready - Need p=reject policy first',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'none', 'Blocked - Need enforcement (p=quarantine or p=reject)',
        'Not Ready - Check DMARC configuration'
    ),
    Requirements = case(
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject' and DkimPassRate >= 99, 'Publish BIMI DNS record + obtain VMC certificate',
        PolicyPublished_p == 'reject', 'Fix DKIM failures before implementing BIMI',
        'Progress DMARC policy to p=reject first'
    )
| project Domain, BIMIReadiness, Policy=PolicyPublished_p, PassRate, DkimPassRate, Requirements
| sort by BIMIReadiness asc
content.title: BIMI Readiness Assessment

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(DkimSelector)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    PassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, DkimResult == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1)
    by DkimDomain, DkimSelector
| extend
    DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSeen),
    ActiveDuration = datetime_diff('day', LastSeen, FirstSeen),
    Status = case(
        datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSeen) <= 2, 'Active',
        datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSeen) <= 7, 'Recently Inactive',
        'Retired'
    )
| project DkimDomain, DkimSelector, Status, Messages, PassRate, FirstSeen, LastSeen, ActiveDuration, DaysSinceLastSeen
| sort by DkimDomain asc, LastSeen desc
content.title: DKIM Selector Rotation Tracking

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(HeaderFrom)
| extend Subdomain = tolower(HeaderFrom)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    PassedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    FailedMessages = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    BaseDomains = make_set(Domain)
    by Subdomain
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * PassedMessages / Messages, 1)
| project Subdomain, Messages, PassRate, FailedMessages, UniqueIPs, FirstSeen, LastSeen, BaseDomains
| sort by Messages desc
| take 100
content.title: Observed Subdomains (Top 100)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| where isnotempty(EnvelopeFrom) and HeaderFrom != EnvelopeFrom
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize
    SpoofedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    SourceIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 10)
    by HeaderFrom, EnvelopeFrom
| sort by SpoofedMessages desc
| take 50
content.title: Potential Spoofing (Header/Envelope Mismatch + Auth Fail)

content.json:
### DMARC Policy Progression Guidance

**Moving from Monitor to Enforcement:**

- **Current Policy: `p=none` (Monitor Mode)**
  - Safe to move to `p=quarantine` if:
    - Pass rate is consistently >=95-99% for at least 30 days
    - All legitimate mail sources are authenticated (review Top Source IPs)
    - No business-critical senders are failing authentication
  - Action: Review suspicious IPs and subdomain discovery before progressing

- **Current Policy: `p=quarantine` (Quarantine Mode)**
  - Safe to move to `p=reject` if:
    - Pass rate is consistently >=99% for at least 30-60 days
    - Zero complaints from users about legitimate mail in spam/quarantine
    - All critical business workflows tested and verified
  - Action: Consider starting with `pct=10` then gradually increase

- **Current Policy: `p=reject` (Reject Mode)**
  - You've achieved full DMARC enforcement!
  - Continue monitoring for new legitimate sources and authentication failures
  - Ensure subdomain policy (`sp=`) is also set appropriately

**Best Practices:**
- Use `pct=` to apply policy to a percentage of messages during transition
- Monitor for at least 7-14 days after any policy change
- Always verify legitimate mail providers are authenticated before enforcing
- Set up Azure Monitor alerts for authentication failure spikes

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
    by Domain
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1)
| project Domain, Messages, PassRate, Fail, UniqueIPs
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Per-Domain Compliance Summary

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    TotalMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    TotalRecords = count(),
    UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueReporters = dcount(ReportOrgName),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail')
| extend PassRate = iff(TotalMessages > 0, round(100.0 * Pass / TotalMessages, 1), 0.0)
| project TotalMessages, TotalRecords, UniqueSourceIPs, UniqueReporters, PassRate
content.title: Summary

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    LastReportTime = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalReports = dcount(ReportId),
    TotalMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    AvgDailyReports = round(1.0 * dcount(ReportId) / max_of(datetime_diff('day', max(TimeGenerated), min(TimeGenerated)), 1), 1)
    by ReportOrgName
| extend
    HoursSinceLastReport = datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastReportTime),
    Freshness = case(
        datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastReportTime) <= 28, 'Fresh',
        datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastReportTime) <= 72, 'Normal',
        datetime_diff('day', now(), LastReportTime) <= 7, 'Delayed',
        'Stale'
    )
| project ReportOrgName, Freshness, LastReportTime, HoursSinceLastReport, TotalReports, TotalMessages, AvgDailyReports
| sort by HoursSinceLastReport desc
content.title: Report Freshness Monitor

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Reports = dcount(ReportId),
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    LastReport = max(TimeGenerated),
    FirstReport = min(TimeGenerated),
    DomainsReported = make_set(Domain, 10)
    by ReportOrgName
| extend
    DaysSinceLastReport = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastReport),
    Status = case(
        datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastReport) <= 48, 'Active',
        datetime_diff('day', now(), LastReport) <= 7, 'Delayed',
        'Stale'
    )
| project ReportOrgName, Status, Reports, Messages, LastReport, FirstReport, DaysSinceLastReport, DomainsReported
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Reporter Coverage Analysis
Missing Expected Reporters (Last 30 Days)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let reporterFilter = dynamic([{Reporter}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where '*' in (reporterFilter) or ReportOrgName in (reporterFilter)
| summarize
    Reports = dcount(ReportId),
    Records = count(),
    Messages = sum(MessageCount)
    by ReportOrgName
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Reports by Provider
Report Volume Over Time by Provider

content.json:
### Azure Monitor Alert Rule Templates

Create alert rules in Azure Monitor using these KQL queries to get notified about DMARC issues. Navigate to **Azure Monitor > Alerts > Create alert rule** and select your Log Analytics workspace.

**1. DMARC Pass Rate Drop Alert** (run every 1 hour, look back 24 hours):
```kql
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'), Total = sum(MessageCount)
| extend PassRate = 100.0 * Pass / Total
| where PassRate < 90
```

**2. New Suspicious Source IP Alert** (run every 6 hours):
```kql
let known = DMARCReports_CL | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d)) | distinct SourceIP;
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where SourceIP !in (known)
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize FailedMessages = sum(MessageCount), Domains = make_set(Domain) by SourceIP
| where FailedMessages >= 10
```

**3. Volume Spike Alert** (run every 1 hour):
```kql
let baseline = DMARCReports_CL | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d)) | summarize AvgDaily = sum(MessageCount) / 29.0;
let recent = DMARCReports_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize RecentTotal = sum(MessageCount);
baseline | extend x = 1 | join kind=inner (recent | extend x = 1) on x
| where RecentTotal > AvgDaily * 3
```

**4. Report Freshness Alert** (run every 24 hours):
```kql
DMARCReports_CL
| summarize LastReport = max(TimeGenerated)
| where LastReport < ago(72h)
```

**Tip:** Set up Action Groups to notify via Email, Teams, Slack (webhook), or trigger a Logic App for automated responses.
